heading: Service of process
label: 20911 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2091136:2104., , .Aug. 10, 1982Pub. L. 97–234, § 496 Stat. 262The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
